title: deep-review recurring-findings payload v1.0
description: Authoritative payload schema for deep-review recurring-findings envelope (artifact_kind=recurring-findings, schema.version=1.0). Mirrors deep-review v1.4.0+ emit shape from Phase 2 envelope adoption. parent_run_id chains to consumed deep-work session-receipt run_id when present.

taxonomy_version.description: Internal severity/category taxonomy version (independent from envelope schema_version).

items.description: Single recurring finding. `severity` + `occurrences` always present; producers emit either `category` + `description` (Phase 2 deep-review canonical) or `fingerprint` + `summary` (cross-report dedupe form).

fingerprint.description: Stable hash for cross-report dedupe (e.g., sha256:<hex>:<tag>).
